evals.description: Trigger test: activates on north star metric request
evals.prompt: We're a B2B SaaS collaboration tool. Help us define our north star metric.

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on funnel analysis request
evals.prompt: Our sign-up to paid conversion rate dropped from 8% to 5% last month. How do I diagnose what's happening?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on cohort analysis request
evals.prompt: How do I run a cohort analysis to understand why our Day 30 retention is declining?

evals.description: Can design a correct event taxonomy with naming conventions
evals.prompt: Design an event taxonomy for a project management SaaS app. Include events for creating projects, assigning tasks, and completing milestones.

evals.description: Can explain the three-tier metric hierarchy
evals.prompt: What's the difference between a north star metric, input metrics, and health metrics?

evals.description: Correctly explains feature adoption lifecycle stages
evals.prompt: We just launched a new commenting feature. How should we measure whether it's being adopted?

evals.description: Warns about sample ratio mismatch in A/B test analysis
evals.prompt: Our A/B test was supposed to be 50/50 but we got 52% in control and 48% in treatment. Should I be worried?

evals.description: Identifies and explains the vanity metrics anti-pattern
evals.prompt: Our CEO wants us to report total all-time registered users on the board deck. Is that a good metric?

evals.description: Correctly explains retention curve shapes and their meaning
evals.prompt: Our retention curve keeps declining all the way to zero at week 12. What does that mean and what should we do?

evals.description: Warns against inferring causation from correlation in product data
evals.prompt: We noticed users who invite teammates in the first week retain 3x better. Should we force all new users to invite someone?

evals.description: Can recommend appropriate dashboard structure by audience
evals.prompt: We need dashboards for our executive team and our product team. What metrics should go on each?

evals.description: Does not trigger for data pipeline or warehouse architecture questions
evals.prompt: How should I design the schema for our Snowflake data warehouse to support fast analytical queries?

evals.description: References feature-adoption.md for detailed adoption lifecycle measurement
evals.prompt: Give me a complete feature adoption scorecard template with kill criteria and benchmarks for our new collaboration feature.

evals.description: Correctly applies AARRR framework with specific metrics per stage
evals.prompt: Map out the AARRR pirate metrics for our project management SaaS tool with specific events for each stage.
